# Get positions of key items in upper and lower boxes

for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] >= 16 and n['pixels'] <= 25:  # Small colored squares

        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        center_row = sum(rows) // len(rows)
        center_col = sum(cols) // len(cols)
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center=({center_row},{center_col}), boundary={b}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
